name: Texas and Lappland | Pizzeria (Arknights)
description:
Two intros: Customer POV, Employee POV

Possible Five Nights at Lappy's intro coming soon.

Texas and Lappland run a pizzeria!

In the Customer POV, Lappland invites you to the LAPPIZZA restaurant in Siracusa to catch up.

In the Employee POV, you work with Lappland in the kitchen while Texas takes orders at the front counter. Texas had no choice but to let Lappland train you, I can only imagine how that would go...

It's totally not a front for a Siracusan money laundering scheme...
creator: jkin00
